purpose: Define the standard controller actions that must appear on every report candidate item before it can become a confirmed total-control task, dismissed signal, reassigned project item, or owner goal request.

decisionStatuses.label: 待控制者確認
decisionStatuses.meaning: The system found a candidate but it has not been accepted, dismissed, or corrected.

decisionStatuses.label: 已建立任務
decisionStatuses.meaning: The controller accepted the candidate and a total-control task was created or linked.

decisionStatuses.label: 不是任務
decisionStatuses.meaning: The controller dismissed the candidate as context, chat, or no-action information.

decisionStatuses.label: 已改專案
decisionStatuses.meaning: The candidate project was corrected and should be re-evaluated under the new project.

decisionStatuses.label: 已指定專案目標
decisionStatuses.meaning: The candidate is attached to a project-level goal.

decisionStatuses.label: 已指定任務目標
decisionStatuses.meaning: The candidate has a concrete task-level goal.

decisionStatuses.label: 待負責人口述目標
decisionStatuses.meaning: The candidate needs the responsible owner to state the target or completion condition before final task creation or tracking.

actions.label: 建立任務
actions.intent: Confirm that the candidate is a real total-control task.

actions.label: 不是任務
actions.intent: Mark the candidate as non-task context so it will not keep resurfacing.

actions.label: 改專案
actions.intent: Correct which total-control project owns the candidate.

actions.label: 指定專案目標
actions.intent: Attach the candidate to a project-level target before task tracking.

actions.label: 指定任務目標
actions.intent: Define the concrete outcome expected from this candidate.

actions.label: 要求負責人口述目標
actions.intent: Ask the responsible owner to state the target, completion condition, or next commitment in LINE.
